name: community contribution promotion to tier-1 requires exactly two reviewer approvals per REVIEW.md
command:
mkdir -p community/sources && printf 'id: x
contributor: alice
review_status: pending
eval_evidence: x
license: MIT
reviewers: [bob]
proposed_tier: 1
' > community/sources/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/community/promote.sh" --entry community/sources/x.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'reviewers_required>=2' err.txt && grep -q 'reviewers_count=1' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
